'''√t-w-th''' ('''katawath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quire|quire]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quire|quire]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √t-w-th
|-
! Lemma
| katawath
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thitawath || jitawath || shitawath || kitawath
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthutawath || jujutawath || shushutawath || kukutawath
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thutawath || jutawath || shutawath || kutawath
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thutawath || jutawath || shutawath || kutawath
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thetawath || jetawath || shetawath || ketawath
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothotawath || jojotawath || shoshotawath || kokotawath
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thotawath || jotawath || shotawath || kotawath
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thotawath || jotawath || shotawath || kotawath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || tawath || tawath || tawath || tawath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || tawath || tawath || tawath || tawath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || tawath || tawath || tawath || tawath
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || tawath || tawath || tawath || tawath
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thætawath || jætawath || shætawath || kætawath
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathatawath || jajatawath || shashatawath || kakatawath
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thatawath || jatawath || shatawath || katawath
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thatawath || jatawath || shatawath || katawath
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shatawath
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshatawath
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishatawath
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shatawathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshatawathnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishatawathnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shatawathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshatawathnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishatawathshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shatawathro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshatawathnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishatawathro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shatawathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshatawathnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishatawathmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shatawathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshatawathnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishatawathsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shatawathng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshatawathnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishatawathng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shatawathya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshatawathnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishatawathya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shatawathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshatawathnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishatawathyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shatawathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshatawathnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishatawathnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shatawathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshatawathnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishatawathnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shatawathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshatawathnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishatawathnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shatawathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshatawathnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishatawathshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shatawathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshatawathnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishatawathshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shatawathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshatawathnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishatawathshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shatawathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshatawathnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishatawathronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shatawathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshatawathnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishatawathroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shatawathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshatawathnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishatawathromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shatawathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshatawathnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishatawathmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shatawathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshatawathnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishatawathmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shatawathmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshatawathnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishatawathmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5a3fb4a}}
